/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto -fno-fat-lto-objects -fuse-ld=gold -Wl,--gc-sections CMakeFiles/simulate.dir/main.cc.o -o ../../../bin/simulate  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib" ../../../lib/libsimulate.a ../../../lib/libmujoco.so.3.8.1 ../../../lib/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
